arts.ttl: Troy Parrott has no regrets over Tottenham exit: 'I look back with a smile'
arts.sum: Former Spurs striker has been a success at new club AZ Alkmaar

arts.ttl: CONFIRMED: Tottenham lead race to sign former Chelsea wonderkid
arts.sum: Tottenham are optimistic about securing the signing of Tyler Dibling, according to various reports. Tottenham favourites to sign Dibling

arts.ttl: Prem panel: VAR right to scrap Everton pen vs Utd
arts.sum: The Premier League's Key Match Incidents Panel has ruled that the VAR intervention to cancel Everton's stoppage-time penalty against Manchester United last month was correct.

arts.ttl: Cristian Romero hint dropped and missing players in Tottenham training for AZ Alkmaar
arts.sum: Receiving an injury boost last month with players such as Guglielmo Vicario, James Maddison and Brennan Johnson returning, Spurs now have Cristian Romero, Micky van de Ven and Dominic Solanke back on the training pitch. Ange Postecoglou's Tottenham team are back on the training pitch as they prepare for their Europa League clash against AZ Alkmaar.

arts.ttl: Why Tottenham never wear navy shorts at home in Europe
'The X-factor': Tottenham told 'magic' Champions League ace who's one of their top summer targets plays like Joe Cole
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are likely to be busy in the summer transfer window as Ange Postecoglou looks to strengthen his ranks further. Spurs have been linked...

arts.ttl: Dejan Kulusevski alternatives for Ange Postecoglou as Tottenham set for injury timeline update
arts.sum: In a season where the north London club have had to deal with a host of different injuries, Kulusevski has been a constant in the team and featured in every single Spurs match in the 2024/25 campaign up until now. Things have started to ease up on the injury front for Tottenham and that means the head coach does have plenty of Kulusevski alternatives to choose from, starting against AZ Alkmaar on Thursday night.

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou granted new Mathys Tel opportunity to enhance future Tottenham plans
arts.sum: "With Mathys, and I’m not on social media but I can just imagine the comments about him, he’s 19-years-old, he hadn’t played a lot, we’ve thrown him in and kept him in there because I want to build up his fitness. Brought to Tottenham to give them a boost in the final third whether playing through the middle or from the wing, the 19-year-old could not make a difference in the 18-yard box after only having two touches of the ball in City's area.

arts.ttl: Tottenham's 15 attackers' summer transfer fates with eight possible exits and Richarlison call
arts.sum: After three injury-hit seasons as a Tottenham player, it may be best for Spurs to part with the 27-year-old this summer if there is interest and bring in another option up front . Tel joined Tottenham on loan on the final day of the January transfer window and the club do have the option to buy him permanently for £45.8million come the summer.

arts.ttl: Spurs team Postecoglou to pick vs AZ with Kulusevski out and Romero starts
arts.sum: Postecoglou will be wary of the mess that came from putting Romero and Van de Ven straight back in against Chelsea, but there could be a case for playing one in each half on this occasion to increase their fitness and sharpness with Bournemouth coming to the Tottenham Hotspur Stadium on Sunday. Gold's team: Vicario; Porro, Romero, Danso, Spence; Bergvall, Bentancur, Maddison; Johnson, Son, Odobert.
